hero.title: Our Partners
hero.subtitle: Strategic technology partnerships that amplify our capabilities.

section.title: Technology Partnerships
section.subtitle: We partner with industry leaders to deliver best-in-class solutions.

list.iomete: Official IOMETE partner providing modern Data Lakehouse solutions. IOMETE offers a unified analytics platform built on Apache Spark and Apache Iceberg for scalable data processing.
list.denodo: Strategic partner for data virtualization solutions. Denodo enables real-time data integration across disparate sources without physical data movement.
list.datasunrise: Database security partner providing comprehensive data protection, masking, and audit solutions for enterprise databases.
list.securemax: Security solutions partner specializing in infrastructure security, compliance, and risk management for critical data systems.
list.vanderlog: Cybersecurity services and solutions provider, offering comprehensive protection for enterprise IT infrastructure and data assets.
list.accelario: Database cloning and test data management platform enabling rapid provisioning of production-like database copies with built-in data masking and encryption.
